description: Test your knowledge of Black Friday deals, retail traditions, holiday spending habits, consumer economics, and budgeting strategies during the festive shopping season

questions.question: This day, occurring the Friday after Thanksgiving, marks the unofficial start of the Christmas shopping season
questions.answer: What is Black Friday?

questions.question: This online shopping event happens on the Monday following Thanksgiving weekend
questions.answer: What is Cyber Monday?

questions.question: This giant online retailer founded by Jeff Bezos sees massive holiday traffic
questions.answer: What is Amazon?

questions.question: This payment service lets you split purchases into 4 interest-free payments
questions.answer: What is Afterpay (or Klarna)?

questions.question: This type of card with a specific dollar amount loaded on it makes a popular gift
questions.answer: What is a gift card?

questions.question: This percentage off your purchase is also known as a discount
questions.answer: What is a sale?

questions.question: This French luxury brand with interlocking C's is a dream gift for many shoppers
questions.answer: What is Chanel?

questions.question: This Apple product line of smartphones is consistently among the most gifted items
questions.answer: What is the iPhone?

questions.question: This term describes when stores reduce prices to clear out inventory
questions.answer: What is a clearance sale?

questions.question: This digital code entered at checkout gives you a discount online
questions.answer: What is a promo code (or coupon code)?

questions.question: This mall retailer Victoria's Secret is famous for these semi-annual events
questions.answer: What are sales?

questions.question: This gaming console from Sony is a highly sought-after holiday gift
questions.answer: What is PlayStation (or PS5)?

questions.question: This Microsoft gaming console competes with PlayStation
questions.answer: What is Xbox?

questions.question: This retail giant with a red bullseye logo offers big Black Friday deals
questions.answer: What is Target?

questions.question: This payment method requires a PIN and deducts money directly from your bank account
questions.answer: What is a debit card?

questions.question: This athletic brand with the swoosh logo is popular for gift-giving
questions.answer: What is Nike?

questions.question: This list you make before shopping helps you stay organized and on budget
questions.answer: What is a shopping list?

questions.question: This policy allows you to bring items back to the store for a refund
questions.answer: What is a return policy?

questions.question: This financial limit you set helps prevent overspending during the holidays
questions.answer: What is a budget?

questions.question: This December 25th holiday is the biggest shopping season of the year
questions.answer: What is Christmas?

questions.question: This wireless earbuds product from Apple are a popular stocking stuffer
questions.answer: What are AirPods?

questions.question: This beauty retailer Sephora offers this tier program for loyal shoppers
questions.answer: What is a rewards program (or loyalty program)?

questions.question: This tax added at checkout increases your final price
questions.answer: What is sales tax?

questions.question: This makeup brand founded by Rihanna is called Fenty this
questions.answer: What is Beauty?

questions.question: This fast-fashion retailer from Sweden is known for affordable trendy clothing
questions.answer: What is H&M?

questions.question: This streaming service subscription makes a popular gift at around $10-15 per month
questions.answer: What is Netflix (or Spotify, Disney+)?

questions.question: This Spanish fast-fashion brand is pronounced 'zah-rah'
questions.answer: What is Zara?

questions.question: This purchase protection plan extends beyond the manufacturer's warranty
questions.answer: What is an extended warranty (or protection plan)?

questions.question: This cosmetics store Ulta offers this type of shopping experience online and in-store
questions.answer: What is omnichannel (or hybrid)?

questions.question: This shipping speed gets your package to you the very next day
questions.answer: What is overnight (or next-day) shipping?

questions.question: This doorbuster shopping day after Thanksgiving got its name from stores' profit margins going from red to this color
questions.answer: What is Black Friday?

questions.question: This acronym BOGO means you get two items but pay for only one
questions.answer: What is Buy One Get One (Free)?

questions.question: This membership warehouse club requires an annual fee but offers bulk discounts
questions.answer: What is Costco (or Sam's Club)?

questions.question: This small business shopping day occurs on the Saturday after Thanksgiving
questions.answer: What is Small Business Saturday?

questions.question: This charitable movement on the Tuesday after Thanksgiving encourages giving instead of shopping
questions.answer: What is Giving Tuesday?

questions.question: This final date for retailers to earn revenue ends on December 24th or 25th
questions.answer: What is the holiday shopping deadline?

questions.question: This Amazon membership program offers free two-day shipping for an annual fee
questions.answer: What is Amazon Prime?

questions.question: This type of interest rate on credit cards can reach 20-30% if you carry a balance
questions.answer: What is APR (Annual Percentage Rate)?

questions.question: This online payment platform founded by Elon Musk lets you send money using email
questions.answer: What is PayPal?

questions.question: This retail strategy prices items at $9.99 instead of $10 to appear cheaper
questions.answer: What is psychological pricing (or charm pricing)?

questions.question: This four-letter acronym describes the retail traffic on Black Friday
questions.answer: What is BUSY (or RUSH)?

questions.question: This cashback browser extension automatically finds coupon codes at checkout
questions.answer: What is Honey (or Rakuten)?

questions.question: This post-Christmas shopping day on December 26th is huge in Commonwealth countries
questions.answer: What is Boxing Day?

questions.question: This consumer price metric tracked by the Bureau of Labor Statistics measures inflation
questions.answer: What is CPI (Consumer Price Index)?

questions.question: This retail apocalypse term describes stores closing due to online competition
questions.answer: What is brick-and-mortar decline?

questions.question: This holiday spending metric is closely watched by economists to gauge consumer confidence
questions.answer: What is retail sales (or consumer spending)?

questions.question: This type of fraud using stolen credit card information spikes during the holidays
questions.answer: What is identity theft (or credit card fraud)?

questions.question: This envelope budgeting system uses physical cash for different spending categories
questions.answer: What is the envelope method (or cash envelope system)?

questions.question: This delivery service option lets you pick up online orders at the store for free
questions.answer: What is BOPIS (Buy Online Pick-up In Store)?

questions.question: This economic quarter including the holidays is Q4, ending on this date
questions.answer: What is December 31st?

questions.question: This mobile payment system from Apple lets you pay with your phone
questions.answer: What is Apple Pay?

questions.question: This credit score range of 300-850 determines your loan approval odds
questions.answer: What is a FICO score?

questions.question: This December shopping rush is called this 'super' Saturday before Christmas
questions.answer: What is Super Saturday (or Panic Saturday)?

questions.question: This layaway alternative lets you pay in installments but take the item home immediately
questions.answer: What is buy now pay later (BNPL)?

questions.question: This retail metric measures sales per square foot of store space
questions.answer: What is sales density (or revenue per square foot)?

questions.question: This department store chain filed for bankruptcy in 2020 after 125 years
questions.answer: What is JCPenney?

questions.question: This contactless payment technology uses radio waves and is abbreviated NFC
questions.answer: What is Near Field Communication?

questions.question: This Chinese shopping holiday on November 11th is called Singles' Day or this
questions.answer: What is 11.11 (or Double 11)?

questions.question: This regressive tax disproportionately affects lower-income holiday shoppers
questions.answer: What is sales tax?

questions.question: This subscription model charges customers monthly instead of one-time purchases
questions.answer: What is a subscription service (or recurring revenue)?

questions.question: This phenomenon where limited-time deals create urgency is called FOMO, meaning this
questions.answer: What is Fear Of Missing Out?

questions.question: This retail tactic places impulse-buy items near the checkout to encourage last-minute purchases
questions.answer: What is point-of-sale marketing (or checkout merchandising)?

questions.question: This economics term describes when you spend more because you're using a credit card versus cash
questions.answer: What is the cashless effect (or credit card premium)?

questions.question: This toy shopping frenzy in 1996 involved parents fighting over this red Muppet
questions.answer: Who is Tickle Me Elmo?

questions.question: This percentage of holiday shoppers start before Halloween has grown to over 40%
questions.answer: What are early shoppers (or early birds)?

questions.question: This pricing strategy charges different customers different prices based on their willingness to pay
questions.answer: What is dynamic pricing (or price discrimination)?

questions.question: This Swedish payment app Klarna offers 'pay in 4' using this business model abbreviation
questions.answer: What is BNPL (Buy Now Pay Later)?

questions.question: This amount that the average American spends on holiday gifts is around $1,000 per person
questions.answer: What is holiday spending (or gift budget)?

questions.question: This cognitive bias makes you value items more highly simply because you own them
questions.answer: What is the endowment effect?

questions.question: This term describes fake discounts where the 'original' price was never actually charged
questions.answer: What is artificial inflation (or phantom pricing)?

questions.question: This resale platform lets you buy and sell secondhand designer items authenticated by experts
questions.answer: What is The RealReal (or Vestiaire Collective, Rebag)?

questions.question: This minimum order amount is often required to qualify for free shipping, typically $25-50
questions.answer: What is a shipping threshold (or minimum purchase)?

questions.question: This type of shopping cart software tracks items you want to buy but haven't purchased yet
questions.answer: What is an online shopping cart (or wish list)?

questions.question: This economic principle states that as prices drop, demand increases during Black Friday sales
questions.answer: What is the law of demand?

questions.question: This return fraud scheme involves wearing clothes with tags on and returning them after use
questions.answer: What is wardrobing?

questions.question: This social commerce feature on Instagram lets you shop directly from posts and stories
questions.answer: What is Instagram Shopping (or shoppable posts)?

questions.question: This gamification technique gives you points or miles for purchases to encourage loyalty
questions.answer: What is a rewards program (or points system)?

questions.question: This scarcity principle makes limited-edition sneaker drops sell out in seconds
questions.answer: What is artificial scarcity (or limited supply)?

questions.question: This Chinese e-commerce giant Alibaba runs the world's largest shopping event on 11/11
questions.answer: What is Singles' Day (or Double 11)?

questions.question: This marketing tactic uses countdown timers to create urgency for flash sales
questions.answer: What is scarcity marketing (or urgency tactics)?

questions.question: This peer-to-peer payment app owned by PayPal lets friends split costs using Venmo
questions.answer: What is Venmo?

questions.question: This environmental movement encourages thrifting and secondhand shopping on Black Friday
questions.answer: What is Buy Nothing Day (or sustainable shopping)?

questions.question: This bot software automatically purchases limited-release items faster than humans can
questions.answer: What are sneaker bots (or purchase bots)?

questions.question: This financial literacy term means spending money on experiences rather than material goods
questions.answer: What is experiential consumption?

questions.question: This retail strategy of 'anchoring' shows a high original price to make the sale price seem better
questions.answer: What is price anchoring (or reference pricing)?

questions.question: This phenomenon where stores run out of popular items is called this type of shortage
questions.answer: What is stock-out (or inventory shortage)?

questions.question: This subscription box service delivers curated clothing items monthly for a styling fee
questions.answer: What is Stitch Fix (or Trunk Club)?

questions.question: This hidden cost in online shopping includes shipping, taxes, and fees added at checkout
questions.answer: What are total landed costs (or final price)?

questions.question: This resale market for collectible sneakers is estimated to be worth $6 billion annually
questions.answer: What is the sneaker resale market (or sneakerhead economy)?

questions.question: This percentage of shopping carts are abandoned online, typically around 70%
questions.answer: What is cart abandonment rate?

questions.question: This consumer protection law requires retailers to honor advertised prices and prevents bait-and-switch
questions.answer: What is truth in advertising (or FTC regulations)?

questions.question: This economic indicator measuring total U.S. holiday sales reached $936 billion in 2023
questions.answer: What is holiday retail spending (or seasonal sales)?

questions.question: This budgeting rule allocates 50% to needs, 30% to wants, and 20% to savings
questions.answer: What is the 50/30/20 rule?

questions.question: This credit card feature offers 1-5% back on purchases, popular during holiday shopping
questions.answer: What are cashback rewards?

questions.question: This inventory management strategy keeps 'just enough' stock to minimize warehouse costs
questions.answer: What is Just-In-Time (JIT) inventory?

questions.question: This retail metric comparing this year's sales to last year's is abbreviated YoY
questions.answer: What is Year-over-Year growth?

questions.question: This consumer debt reaches its annual peak in January after holiday shopping, averaging $6,000
questions.answer: What is credit card debt?

questions.question: This shipping cut-off date for USPS Ground is typically December 17-18 for Christmas delivery
questions.answer: What is the shipping deadline?

questions.question: This pricing algorithm adjusts prices in real-time based on demand, competition, and inventory
questions.answer: What is algorithmic pricing (or dynamic pricing)?

questions.question: This retail strategy offers 0% APR financing for 12-24 months on large purchases
questions.answer: What is deferred interest (or promotional financing)?

questions.question: This economic theory explains why discounted luxury goods still signal status despite being on sale
questions.answer: What is conspicuous consumption (or Veblen effect)?

questions.question: This fulfillment model where retailers ship directly from manufacturers is called drop-shipping
questions.answer: What is drop-shipping?

questions.question: This tax-free shopping period offered by some states during back-to-school and holidays
questions.answer: What is a sales tax holiday?

questions.question: This retail apocalypse saw Toys 'R' Us liquidate in 2018 after filing for this legal protection
questions.answer: What is bankruptcy (Chapter 11)?

questions.question: This consumer sentiment index from the University of Michigan predicts holiday spending trends
questions.answer: What is the Consumer Confidence Index (or sentiment survey)?

questions.question: This markup percentage from wholesale to retail price typically ranges from 50-100% (keystone pricing)
questions.answer: What is retail markup (or margin)?

questions.question: This behavioral economics concept explains why we irrationally spend more during sales
questions.answer: What is the sunk cost fallacy (or loss aversion)?

questions.question: This customer acquisition cost (CAC) for retailers spikes 50% during the holiday season
questions.answer: What is customer acquisition cost?

questions.question: This fraud prevention system flags suspicious transactions using machine learning algorithms
questions.answer: What is fraud detection (or risk scoring)?

questions.question: This retail showrooming practice involves browsing in-store but purchasing online for better prices
questions.answer: What is showrooming?

questions.question: This supply chain bottleneck at West Coast ports delayed 2021 holiday inventory by weeks
questions.answer: What is port congestion (or supply chain crisis)?

questions.question: This chargeback ratio above 1% can result in retailers losing their payment processing privileges
questions.answer: What is chargeback rate (or dispute ratio)?

questions.question: This retail metric measures how many times inventory sells and is replaced annually
questions.answer: What is inventory turnover (or stock turn)?

questions.question: This omnichannel strategy integrates online and offline shopping for seamless experiences
questions.answer: What is unified commerce (or omnichannel retail)?

questions.question: This loss prevention technique uses RFID tags and electronic article surveillance to prevent theft
questions.answer: What is EAS (Electronic Article Surveillance)?

questions.question: This personalization engine uses AI to recommend products based on browsing history
questions.answer: What is a recommendation algorithm (or collaborative filtering)?

questions.question: This retail calendar metric called 'retail weeks' standardizes the 4-5-4 calendar for comparisons
questions.answer: What is the retail calendar (or 4-5-4 calendar)?

questions.question: This conversion rate optimization (CRO) increases the percentage of visitors who make purchases
questions.answer: What is conversion rate optimization?

questions.question: This Department of Commerce report tracks monthly retail sales as a key economic indicator
questions.answer: What is the Advance Monthly Retail Trade Report?

questions.question: This subscription fatigue phenomenon occurs when consumers feel overwhelmed by recurring charges
questions.answer: What is subscription fatigue (or subscription overload)?

questions.question: This cognitive bias makes you believe that because something is expensive, it must be of higher quality
questions.answer: What is the price-quality heuristic (or premium pricing effect)?

questions.question: This economic paradox explains why some luxury goods sell MORE when prices increase
questions.answer: What is the Veblen effect (or Giffen good)?

questions.question: This 1985 Cabbage Patch Kids shortage is an example of this marketing strategy creating artificial demand
questions.answer: What is manufactured scarcity?

questions.question: This neuromarketing technique uses brain imaging to study consumer purchasing decisions
questions.answer: What is neuroeconomics (or consumer neuroscience)?

questions.question: This Nobel Prize-winning economist Daniel Kahneman described two systems of thinking that affect shopping decisions
questions.answer: Who is Daniel Kahneman?

questions.question: This cryptocurrency payment option is accepted by some retailers but faces volatility issues
questions.answer: What is Bitcoin (or cryptocurrency)?

questions.question: This marketing psychology principle explains why we buy more when prices end in .99 versus .00
questions.answer: What is the left-digit effect?

questions.question: This A/B testing methodology helps retailers optimize checkout pages to reduce cart abandonment
questions.answer: What is conversion rate optimization (or multivariate testing)?

questions.question: This economic theory of 'rational actor' is contradicted by impulse holiday purchases
questions.answer: What is homo economicus (or rational choice theory)?

questions.question: This attention economy concept explains why social media influencers can drive purchasing decisions
questions.answer: What is the attention economy (or influencer marketing)?

questions.question: This decoy pricing effect offers three options to make the middle option seem most appealing
questions.answer: What is the decoy effect (or asymmetric dominance)?

questions.question: This machine learning technique predicts which customers are most likely to make purchases
questions.answer: What is predictive analytics (or propensity modeling)?

questions.question: This zero-sum game theory applies to limited-edition product drops where one person's gain is another's loss
questions.answer: What is zero-sum game theory?

questions.question: This consumer protection regulation GDPR affects how retailers collect and use shopping data in Europe
questions.answer: What is GDPR (General Data Protection Regulation)?

questions.question: This paradox of choice theory suggests that too many options actually decreases purchase satisfaction
questions.answer: What is the paradox of choice (or choice overload)?

questions.question: This blockchain technology enables NFT digital collectibles sold as holiday gifts
questions.answer: What is blockchain (or distributed ledger)?

questions.question: This hedonic adaptation principle explains why new purchases quickly lose their excitement
questions.answer: What is hedonic adaptation (or hedonic treadmill)?

questions.question: This social proof phenomenon makes products with many reviews sell better regardless of quality
questions.answer: What is social proof (or bandwagon effect)?

questions.question: This augmented reality feature lets shoppers virtually try on clothes or makeup before buying
questions.answer: What is AR try-on (or virtual try-on)?

questions.question: This circular economy model focuses on resale, repair, and recycling instead of new purchases
questions.answer: What is the circular economy?

questions.question: This anchoring bias makes the first price you see influence all subsequent price judgments
questions.answer: What is anchoring bias (or focalism)?

questions.question: This loss aversion principle explains why 'save $50' is more effective than 'pay only $150'
questions.answer: What is loss aversion (or prospect theory)?

questions.question: This microeconomic elasticity concept measures how price changes affect quantity demanded
questions.answer: What is price elasticity of demand?

questions.question: This dark pattern UX design trick makes it hard to cancel subscriptions or decline upsells
questions.answer: What are dark patterns (or deceptive design)?

questions.question: This mental accounting bias makes you treat gift money differently than earned income when shopping
questions.answer: What is mental accounting?

questions.question: This hyperbolic discounting explains why you choose immediate gratification over better long-term value
questions.answer: What is hyperbolic discounting (or present bias)?

questions.question: This cohort analysis segments shoppers by generation to predict purchasing behavior patterns
questions.answer: What is cohort analysis (or generational marketing)?

questions.question: This reciprocity norm makes free samples or gifts create obligation to purchase
questions.answer: What is the reciprocity principle (or norm of reciprocity)?

questions.question: This IKEA effect cognitive bias makes you value items more when you assemble or customize them
questions.answer: What is the IKEA effect?

questions.question: This price discrimination strategy charges different segments different prices based on willingness to pay
questions.answer: What is third-degree price discrimination (or market segmentation pricing)?

questions.question: This Keynesian multiplier effect means holiday spending has a compounding impact on GDP beyond the initial purchase
questions.answer: What is the multiplier effect?

questions.question: This Supreme Court case South Dakota v. Wayfair (2018) changed internet sales tax collection rules
questions.answer: What is South Dakota v. Wayfair?

questions.question: This behavioral economics concept from Richard Thaler earned him the Nobel Prize for studying irrational shopping
questions.answer: What is nudge theory (or behavioral economics)?

questions.question: This payment security standard PCI DSS requires retailers to protect credit card data with encryption
questions.answer: What is PCI DSS (Payment Card Industry Data Security Standard)?

questions.question: This microservices architecture enables retailers to scale infrastructure for Black Friday traffic spikes
questions.answer: What is cloud-native architecture (or microservices)?

questions.question: This econometric regression analysis helps retailers forecast demand using historical sales data
questions.answer: What is demand forecasting (or predictive modeling)?

questions.question: This Nash equilibrium in game theory explains why retailers are trapped in a Black Friday discount arms race
questions.answer: What is Nash equilibrium (or prisoner's dilemma)?

questions.question: This attribution modeling technique assigns credit to different marketing touchpoints in the customer journey
questions.answer: What is multi-touch attribution (or marketing attribution)?

questions.question: This warehouse automation using Kiva robots reduced Amazon's fulfillment costs by 20%
questions.answer: What is robotic fulfillment (or warehouse automation)?

questions.question: This Consumer Financial Protection Bureau regulates BNPL services under this lending law
questions.answer: What is the Truth in Lending Act (or Regulation Z)?

questions.question: This Pareto principle suggests 80% of holiday revenue comes from 20% of customers
questions.answer: What is the Pareto principle (or 80/20 rule)?

questions.question: This cohort retention analysis measures customer lifetime value (CLV) across holiday shopping seasons
questions.answer: What is customer lifetime value (or CLV analysis)?

questions.question: This freight derivative contracts let retailers hedge against shipping cost volatility during peak season
questions.answer: What are freight futures (or shipping derivatives)?

questions.question: This antitrust concern about Amazon's dual role as retailer and marketplace host faces FTC scrutiny
questions.answer: What is vertical integration (or platform conflict of interest)?

questions.question: This carbon footprint of e-commerce returns generates 5 billion pounds of landfill waste annually
questions.answer: What is reverse logistics (or returns environmental impact)?

questions.question: This real-time bidding (RTB) auction system prices online ads in milliseconds during holiday campaigns
questions.answer: What is programmatic advertising (or RTB)?

questions.question: This customer data platform (CDP) unifies shopping behavior across channels for personalization
questions.answer: What is a customer data platform (or CDP)?

questions.question: This retail apocalypse metric saw 12,000 store closures in 2020 accelerating the shift to e-commerce
questions.answer: What is store closure rate (or retail consolidation)?

questions.question: This Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act governs holiday product warranties and disclosure requirements
questions.answer: What is the Magnuson-Moss Warranty Act?

questions.question: This cross-price elasticity measures how a discount on turkeys affects demand for cranberry sauce
questions.answer: What is cross-price elasticity of demand?

questions.question: This servitization trend shifts businesses from selling products to selling outcomes or subscriptions
questions.answer: What is servitization (or product-as-a-service)?

questions.question: This Bayesian inference algorithm powers recommendation engines by updating predictions with new shopping data
questions.answer: What is Bayesian inference (or machine learning)?

questions.question: This transaction cost economics theory explains why vertical integration reduces holiday supply chain friction
questions.answer: What is transaction cost economics (or Coase theorem)?

questions.question: This Robinson-Patman Act prohibits price discrimination that harms competition in retail markets
questions.answer: What is the Robinson-Patman Act?

questions.question: This quantum computing application could optimize Black Friday logistics and routing in real-time
questions.answer: What is quantum optimization (or quantum computing)?

questions.question: This marginal propensity to consume (MPC) measures how much of additional income gets spent on holidays
questions.answer: What is marginal propensity to consume?

questions.question: This serverless computing architecture auto-scales to handle Cyber Monday traffic without provisioning servers
questions.answer: What is serverless computing (or Function-as-a-Service)?

questions.question: This brand equity valuation method calculates the premium consumers pay for branded vs. generic items
questions.answer: What is brand valuation (or brand premium)?

questions.question: This Federal Reserve interest rate policy affects holiday credit card rates and consumer borrowing
questions.answer: What is the federal funds rate (or monetary policy)?

questions.question: This agglomeration economy explains why competing retailers cluster together in malls and shopping districts
questions.answer: What is agglomeration economy (or clustering effect)?

no_humanity.clue: Where you buy everything in underwear
Where friends brag about Christmas hauls
People camp out like it's Jesus
Subscriptions mean you're out of ideas
Ruins dinners worse than burnt turkey

no_humanity.correctQuestion: What is they hate their family?

no_humanity.clue: Credit card offers translate to this

no_humanity.correctQuestion: What is 'I don't care about you'?
What is an escape from your family?
What is 'Wonderful Christmastime' by Paul McCartney?
